prestazioni: Engine swap to Fiat's 1.4L MultiAir Turbo (engine code: T-JET 180) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo connecting rods) and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, supporting 280 HP at 6,500 RPM with a custom ECU map by Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+ tune with ethanol flex-fuel capability).

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Ypsilon-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates (Sparco Pro 2.0) and polyurethane bushings (Powerflex Black Series) for the front MacPherson struts and rear torsion beam setup.

Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (front) with 305mm two-piece rotors (DBA 4000 Series) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge G-Stop) and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Novitec (Lancia Ypsilon Sport-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler, all painted in historic Lancia Verde Muschio (code: 229).

OEM+ front bumper replacement with a carbon fiber splitter (Seibon Carbon) and integrated LED fog lights (Lux H8 Angel Eyes), paired with a custom rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny-style) in raw carbon fiber.

17-inch OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (7.5J ET35) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (205/40 R17), with custom gold anodized wheel bolts (Titan Racing) and center caps featuring the Lancia Scorpion emblem in red enamel.
